results.evidence: RunningVerdictBar.tsx:13-32 renders 'Comparing...' placeholder with '0/{totalCount} cases' progress bar when completedCount=0
useProgressiveSummary.ts accumulates outputs_ready and case_complete events, derives skillAvg/baselineAvg/delta. ComparisonPage.tsx:115 wires it
useProgressiveSummary.ts:102 calls computeVerdict() for previewVerdict. RunningVerdictBar.tsx:56-64 renders verdict pill with VERDICT_STYLES
RunningVerdictBar.tsx:37 detects isFinal when completedCount===totalCount. Same data shape as final verdict card ensures seamless transition
ComparisonPage.tsx:204 showFixButton = caseIsComplete && caseAssertions.length > 0 && failingAssertions.length > 0. Button renders at line 247-262
ComparisonPage.tsx:204 failingAssertions.length > 0 required, so zero failures = no button
ComparisonPage.tsx:204 caseAssertions.length > 0 required, so zero assertions = no button
ComparisonPage.tsx:251 builds notes from failingAssertions.map(a => a.text).join('; ') and passes as URL-encoded notes param
verdict.ts:21 returns EMERGING when passRate < 0.4 AND skillAvg > baselineAvg. Test verdict.test.ts:26 confirms computeVerdict(0.33, 5.0, 0.0) = EMERGING
verdict.ts:24 returns DEGRADING when passRate < 0.4 AND skillAvg <= baselineAvg. Test verdict.test.ts:35 confirms
verdict.ts:12-19 unchanged for EFFECTIVE/MARGINAL/INEFFECTIVE. Boundary tests at verdict.test.ts:42-61 confirm
ComparisonPage.tsx:340 uses 'Rubric Delta' label. RunningVerdictBar.tsx:84 uses 'Rubric Delta' label. No 'Delta' without prefix found
BenchmarkPage.tsx:209 title='Run all eval cases with your skill and grade assertions'
BenchmarkPage.tsx:222 title='Run all eval cases without your skill to measure raw LLM capability'
BenchmarkPage.tsx:233 title='Run each case both with and without your skill, then blind-score and compare'
BenchmarkPage.tsx:208 btn-primary (filled), :220 btn-ghost with orange outline, :232 btn-purple (accent). All distinct styles
BenchmarkPage.tsx:239-241 info text: 'Tip: Use A/B to see if your skill actually improves output quality'
